creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text: In version 0.19 added support for logging messages via syslog. To configure the rotation of logs, the directory /usr/local/etc/newsyslog.conf.d should be used by default as described here https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?newsyslog. Therefore, using a directory /usr/local/etc/newsyslog.d may be a mistake. Or am I wrong?
